query: INSERT INTO map_locations (placeId, name, slug, type, latitude, longitude, published, createdAt, updatedAt) SELECT id, name, slug, type, latitude, longitude, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM places WHERE type = 'island' AND slug NOT IN (SELECT slug FROM map_locations WHERE type = 'island') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW();
